market_summary.KOSPI: Surged 4.39% to 5,600+, rebounding from recent geopolitical volatility.

art_highlights.detail: Launched Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 Collection featuring 25 works and selected pieces from the Lee Kun-Hee Collection.
